footer.automated_notice: This is an automated email. Please do not reply directly.

otp.subject: Your verification code — {schoolName}
otp.heading: Your Verification Code

context_messages.whatsapp_verification: To verify your WhatsApp number with {schoolName}, use this code:
context_messages.email_verification: To verify your email address with {schoolName}, use this code:
context_messages.security_reset: To reset your password with {schoolName}, use this code:

otp.security_notice: If you didn't request this code, please ignore this message. If you believe your account has been compromised, please contact our support team immediately.

magic_link.subject: Sign in to {schoolName}
magic_link.intro: We received a request to sign in to your {schoolName} account. If you didn't make this request, you can ignore this message.
magic_link.code_heading: Or enter this code on the login page:
magic_link.fallback_text: If the button above doesn't work, copy and paste this link into your browser:
magic_link.security_notice: This link can only be used once. If you didn't request this sign-in link, you can safely ignore this message.

welcome.confirmation: Your enrollment in {enrolledClassName} for {enrolledTermName} has been successfully confirmed!
welcome.next_steps_text: You can now view your class schedule and manage your enrollment through your account dashboard.
welcome.contact_notice: If you have any questions about your enrollment, please contact us.
welcome.questions_text: Questions? Contact our support team for more information about your class and the session schedule.

payment_reminder.heading: Payment Reminder
payment_reminder.intro: This is a reminder that payment for {description} is due soon.
payment_reminder.payment_details: Please log in to your account to make a payment or set up automatic payments.
payment_reminder.late_notice: If payment is not received by {dueDate}, your enrollment may be subject to cancellation.
payment_reminder.questions_text: If you have questions about your payment or need to discuss payment arrangements, please contact us.
payment_reminder.payment_methods: We accept the following payment methods:

class_cancellation.heading: Class Cancellation Notice
class_cancellation.announcement: We regret to inform you that {className} has been cancelled.
class_cancellation.refund_policy: Full refunds for unused classes have been automatically processed and should appear in your account within 3-5 business days.
class_cancellation.contact_support: If you would like to discuss alternative classes or have any questions, please contact our team.
class_cancellation.sorry_message: We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause.

waiting_list_offer.heading: A Spot Just Opened!
waiting_list_offer.offer: Great news! A spot has just become available in {className} for {termName}.
waiting_list_offer.urgent_notice: This spot is reserved for you for 24 hours only.
waiting_list_offer.action_required: To secure your place, please click the button below and complete your enrollment by {expirationTime}.
waiting_list_offer.after_expiration: If you don't enroll within 24 hours, the spot may be offered to the next person on the waiting list.
waiting_list_offer.questions_text: Questions? Contact us right away — we're here to help!
waiting_list_offer.contact_urgency: Time is limited, so we recommend responding as soon as possible.

enrolment_confirmation.subject: Your enrollment at {schoolName}
enrolment_confirmation.waiver_warning_body: Your spot is reserved but your enrollment is NOT active. You will not be permitted to attend class until the waiver is signed. Classes missed while your waiver is pending are not eligible for refund, credit, or makeup.
enrolment_confirmation.link_expires: This link expires in 1 hour. If it has expired, visit the link and enter your email address to receive a new one.
enrolment_confirmation.no_show_policy: Deadline: {deadlineDate}. If the waiver is not signed by this date, your enrollment will be automatically cancelled and a full refund issued.
enrolment_confirmation.confirmation_note: Please contact us if you have any questions.

waiver_reminder.subject: Reminder: sign your waiver for {className}
waiver_reminder.subject_urgent: URGENT: Final reminder — sign your waiver for {className}
waiver_reminder.preview: Action needed: your enrollment is not yet active
waiver_reminder.body: This is a reminder that your enrollment in {className} will not be active until you sign the waiver.
waiver_reminder.body_urgent: This is your FINAL reminder. Your enrollment in {className} will be cancelled if the waiver is not signed within 48 hours.
waiver_reminder.waiver_warning: Your spot is reserved but your enrollment is NOT active. You will not be permitted to attend class until the waiver is signed. Classes missed while your waiver is pending are not eligible for refund, credit, or makeup.
waiver_reminder.link_expires: This link expires in 1 hour. If it has expired, click the link and enter your email to receive a new one.
waiver_reminder.cancellation_warning: If the waiver is not signed by this date, your enrollment will be automatically cancelled and a full refund will be issued.

waiver_cancelled.subject: Your enrollment in {className} has been cancelled
waiver_cancelled.body: Your enrollment in {className} has been automatically cancelled because the required waiver was not signed before the deadline.
waiver_cancelled.contact_note: If you believe this is an error, or if you would like to re-enroll, please contact us.
